mapper.select: select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_DEVICE_BIND_D where monitor_id = #{monitorId} and device_id = #{deviceId} and bind_status = 1 and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)
select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_DEVICE_BIND_D where monitor_id = #{monitorId} and bind_status = 1 and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)
select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_DEVICE_BIND_D where device_id = #{deviceId} and bind_status = 1 and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)
